title: Mediterranean Crumble Bars
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert with a Mediterranean twist, featuring chewy dates and crunchy almond topping.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Line an 8-inch square baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, mix together almond flour, sugar, and crumble mix.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter and lemon zest.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a crumbly mixture forms.
Press half of the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Arrange the dates on top of the crust.
Top the dates with the remaining crumb mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the pan.
